messages.content: Please make following words more cohesive and formal: I am writing this statement to express my strong interests in pursuing a Ph.D. in Computer Science in University of xxx. When I was a child, I already found myself particularly interested in concept of robot, and machine intelligence, and read a lot of science fictions.

I am composing this letter to formally convey my keen interest in undertaking a Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) program in Computer Science at the University of xxx. From a young age, I was innately fascinated by the concept of robotics and machine intelligence, which led me to avidly read numerous works of science fiction.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: My most favorate works are Asimov’s Foundation and Robot series, where the robots’ ability of thinking and expressing left me a deep impression. Since then, I have set up a goal of taking Asimov’s imagination into reality.

Among my favorite literary works are Isaac Asimov's 'Foundation' and 'Robot' series, where the portrayal of robots capable of thought and expression made a profound impact on me. Inspired by these narratives, I have established a goal to transform Asimov's imaginative concepts into tangible reality.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Furthermore, My father is a investor for venture capital. He intended to provide me with various information about how the latest development of artificial intelligence as well as the logic of some startups works. As time goes by, I saw how artificial intelligence play an increasingly important role in our life recently and found that artificial intelligence has great potential to promote the development of human-beings in the future. Therefore, I set up my career goal of looking for solutions in artificial intelligence which benefits human beings and make consistent effort to achieve it.

Moreover, my father, an investor in venture capital, has continually supplied me with a wealth of information regarding the latest advancements in artificial intelligence, as well as insights into the operations of several burgeoning startups. Over time, I have observed the increasingly pivotal role that artificial intelligence plays in modern life and have recognized its immense potential to further human development. Consequently, I have solidified my career objective to explore solutions within the realm of artificial intelligence that will benefit humanity, and I am steadfastly committed to the pursuit of this ambition.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: After completing my undergraduate studies in China, I was eager to explore the difference of artificial intelligence development between my homeland and the U.S.A, which lead the direction of its development.

Upon concluding my undergraduate studies in China, I became eager to understand the disparities in the development of artificial intelligence between my homeland and the United States of America, a nation that is at the forefront of steering its evolution.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Therefore, I choose to continue my graduate study in U.S.A and was successfully admitted by the University of California, Berkeley’s Master Program. As an international student, even though I was capable of speak English fluently, I was still acutely aware of the challenges of adapting to a new culture and learning environment.

Consequently, I elected to pursue my graduate education in the United States and was subsequently accepted into the University of California, Berkeley's Master's Program. Despite my proficiency in English, as an international student, I remained keenly cognizant of the challenges associated with acclimating to a novel cultural and academic milieu.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Luckily, via frequent communication with my classmates and my capstone project’s supervisor, Prof. Brian Barsky, I adapted myself to the new environment and made great progress in both academic and social life at this top-ranked university. In Prof. Barsky’s project, that utilizes computer vision technology to control cursors on the screen without moving a physical mouse. The project can be widely applied in helping minor groups with disabilities to access computer more easily, whose motivation has helped me to better understand how advanced technology can help underserved population to live a better life.

Fortunately, through consistent engagement with my peers and my capacious dialogue with Professor Brian Barsky, my capstone project's supervisor, I was able to assimilate into the new environment, realizing significant advancement academically and socially at this premier institution. The project under Prof. Barsky's guidance, which employs computer vision technology to manipulate screen cursors without the need for a physical mouse, holds extensive potential applications in assisting individuals with disabilities to access computers with greater ease. This endeavor has further elucidated to me the ways in which cutting-edge technology can be harnessed to enhance the quality of life for marginalized communities.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Additionally, Berkeley’s diverse prespectives also left me deep impression, as I met many students from various background, and we spent a lot of time discussing some advanced topics related to artificial intelligence and my special interests, computer vision. For the first time, I exposed myself to so much creative thinking, including but not limiting to academic ideas, startup proposals, as well as foreseeing.

Moreover, the multifaceted perspectives I encountered at Berkeley have profoundly impacted me, as I engaged with numerous students from diverse backgrounds. We devoted considerable time to the discourse of advanced topics in artificial intelligence, particularly in my area of special interest, computer vision. For the first time, I found myself immersed in an environment of prolific and innovative thought, spanning not only academic concepts but also encompassing startup initiatives and visionary forecasting.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Another particular experience impressed me is that I went to Menlo Park and met some of my father’s friends who engaging in venture capitals on AI. I talked to them and got impressed with the way they cooperate with universities and promote the conversion of creative ideas into real business. They have the amazing ability to identify innoative ideas even if they currently seems not recognized by the market.

An additional experience that left a lasting impression on me was the opportunity to visit Menlo Park, where I met several of my father's acquaintances who are actively involved in venture capital focusing on AI. Engaging in conversation with these individuals, I was struck by the effective collaboration they foster with universities, facilitating the transformation of creative concepts into viable commercial ventures. They possess a remarkable aptitude for identifying innovative ideas that, despite perhaps lacking current market recognition, have the potential to drive forward-looking change.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Interaction with different people gave me knowledge of how to transform creative ideas into viable products,which can be really useful in my future career pursuits.

Interacting with a diverse array of individuals has enriched my understanding of how to convert creative ideas into tangible products—a proficiency that will undoubtedly prove invaluable in my future career endeavors.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Interaction with different people gave me knowledge of how to transform creative ideas into viable products, which can be really useful in my future career pursuits.

Interacting with professionals from varied backgrounds has provided me with insightful knowledge regarding the translation of innovative concepts into commercially viable products, an understanding that will be exceedingly beneficial in my future professional aspirations.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: After graduation, I joined Intel Inc., a cooperation which leads the advanced technology. As a top-level and mature company, Intel holds values including innovation, inclusion as well as inclusion. These values have aligned with my ultimate career goal, including making people’s life benefit from artficial intelligence, regardless of their group, race and faith. After nearly two years work at Intel, I have totally agree with such values and decide to devote my career to enabling artificial intelligance technology to a wider groups of people.

Upon completing my academic program, I embarked on a professional journey with Intel Corporation, an organization at the forefront of advanced technology. Intel, as an established industry leader, upholds core principles centered around innovation, diversity, and inclusivity. These tenets resonate deeply with my own career ambitions to ensure that artificial intelligence serves to enhance the lives of individuals across all demographics, irrespective of their community, ethnicity, or creed. After nearly two years of employment at Intel, I find myself wholeheartedly endorsing these values and am now firmly resolved to dedicate my career to expanding the accessibility of artificial intelligence technology to broader segments of society.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: We are now undergoing an unprecedented revolution of artificial intelligence and I strongly believe that the University of California, Berkeley is the perfect place for me to continue my anademic journey. Not only because my deep connection with this university during my previous study, but also its commitment to the diversity and inclusion have left me deep impression and such the value align with my diverse background and my ultimate career goal.

We currently find ourselves amidst an unparalleled revolution in the field of artificial intelligence, and I am convinced that the University of California, Berkeley is the ideal institution for me to advance my academic pursuits. This conviction stems not only from my profound bond with the university, forged during my previous studies, but also from its staunch dedication to diversity and inclusion—a commitment that has made a significant impression on me. These values resonate with my eclectic background and harmonize with my long-term professional objectives.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: We are now undergoing an unprecedented revolution of artificial intelligence and I am convinced that the University of California, Berkeley is the perfect place for me to continue my academic pursuits. This is not only because my deep connection with this university during my previous study, but also its dedication to diversity and inclusion. Furthermore, It plays an important role in establish my career goal to introduce technology in artificial intelligence to underdeserved groups. All these valuable characteristics align with my diverse background and ultimate career goal.

We are currently witnessing a revolutionary surge in the field of artificial intelligence, and I firmly believe that the University of California, Berkeley represents the quintessential setting for the furtherance of my scholarly endeavors. My conviction is rooted not simply in the profound connection I cultivated with the institution during my earlier academic experience, but also in its unwavering commitment to diversity and inclusion. Additionally, this esteemed establishment has been instrumental in shaping my career aspiration to make artificial intelligence technologies accessible to underserved communities. These esteemed qualities of the university dovetail seamlessly with my varied background and the career aspirations I am dedicated to achieving.
